<span class="s0">&lt;font </span><span class="s2">face</span><span class="s3">=&quot;Arial, Helvetica&quot; </span><span class="s2">color</span><span class="s3">=&quot;#000000&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;pre&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">#%% </span>
<span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1"># Assignment 1 – Ryann Tompkins</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;hr </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;ls0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">#%% </span>
<span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1"># 1. Data Loading </span><span class="s4">&amp;amp; </span><span class="s1">Exploration</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 1.1 Inspecting dataframe</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">import </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">pandas </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">as </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">pd</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">pd</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">read_csv</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">r</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">C:\Users\ryann\Downloads\bank-additional.csv</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">sep</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">head</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">())</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Shape of dataset:</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">shape</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">info</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">describe</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">describe</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">include</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">object</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 1.2 Identifying Categorical v Numerical</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">numerical_cols </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">select_dtypes</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">include</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">int64</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">float64</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">]).</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">columns</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">categorical_cols </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">select_dtypes</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">include</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">object</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">]).</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">columns</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Numerical variables:</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">numerical_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">\n</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">Categorical variables:</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">categorical_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 1.3 Analyze Distribution</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">y</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">].</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">value_counts</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">y</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">].</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">value_counts</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">normalize</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">True</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### The target variable exhibits clear class imbalance. The majority class (“no”) represents approximately 89% of the observations, while the minority class (“yes”) represents approximately 11%.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 1.4 Explicit and Implicit Missing</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">isnull</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">().</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">sum</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### While the explicit missing values come up as 0, that does not mean there are not implicit missing values.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">== </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">unknown</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">).</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">sum</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### Here, we can see that that many categories have </span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">unknown</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot; </span><span class="s1">rather than missing values, showing the presence of implicit missing values.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 1.5 Visualization</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">import </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">matplotlib</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">pyplot </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">as </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">hist</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">age</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">], </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">bins</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">30</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">title</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Distribution of Age</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">xlabel</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Age</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">ylabel</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Frequency</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">show</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">hist</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">euribor3m</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">], </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">bins</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">30</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">title</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Distribution of Euribor 3M</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">xlabel</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Euribor 3M</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">ylabel</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Frequency</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">show</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">job</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">].</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">value_counts</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">().</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plot</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">kind</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">bar</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">title</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Distribution of Job</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">xticks</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">rotation</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">45</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">show</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">education</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">].</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">value_counts</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">().</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plot</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">kind</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">bar</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">title</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Distribution of Education</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">xticks</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">rotation</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">45</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">plt</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">show</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 1.6 Special Consideration</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">duration</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">].</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">describe</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### Exploration shows that duration is skewed and makes the end result (yes or no) highly predictable. Since it takes place after the start of the call the model would use this to signify the end result, causing data leakage.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;hr </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;ls0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">#%% </span>
<span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1"># 2. Identify Prediction Target</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 2.1 Target Variable</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">var </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">columns</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">target </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">y</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 2.2 Justify</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### The column y represents whether the client subscribed to a term deposit (“yes” or “no”). This aligns directly with the business objective of the marketing campaign: predicting whether a contacted client will subscribe. Therefore, y is the appropriate prediction target.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 2.3 2 Other Options</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### Although duration appears strongly predictive, it is only known after the phone call is completed. Using it would introduce data leakage because the prediction is meant to occur at the time of contact.Similarly, poutcome reflects outcomes from previous campaigns and does not represent the current campaign objective.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;hr </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;ls0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">#%% </span>
<span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1"># 3. Data Splitting</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">import </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">numpy </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">as </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">np</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">from </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">sklearn</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">model_selection </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">import </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">train_test_split</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">from </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">sklearn</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">preprocessing </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">import </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">StandardScaler</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### 3.1 Split data into sets</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">drop</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">y</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">axis</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">1</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">y </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">y</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">]</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_temp</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">y_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">y_temp </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">train_test_split</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">y</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">test_size</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">0.30</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">stratify</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">y</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">random_state</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">42</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_val</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_test</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">y_val</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">y_test </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">train_test_split</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_temp</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">y_temp</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">test_size</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">0.50</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">stratify</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">y_temp</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">random_state</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">42</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Training size:</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">shape</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Validation size:</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_val</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">shape</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Test size:</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_test</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">shape</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>


<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 3.2 Justification</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### I decided to split 70% for the training set, 15% for validation, and 15% for test set. The training set must be large to allow reliable estimation of model parameters. The validation set is used for model selection and hyperparameter tuning, while the test set provides an unbiased estimate of generalization performance. This split balances statistical reliability with sufficient data for evaluation.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 3.3 Stratified Split</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

 <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### As stated earlier the dataset exhibits strong class imbalance, without stratification the minority class might be underrepresented in the validation or test sets, leading to unreliable performance estimates.Stratified splitting ensures that each subset preserves the original class proportions.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 3.4 Stages</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### The dataset must be split before any transformation that learns parameters from data. If splitting were performed later, information from validation and test sets could influence preprocessing steps, leading to data leakage.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;hr </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;ls0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">#%% </span>
<span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1"># 4. Managing Missing Values</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 8.1 Explicit and Implicit Missing Values</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">isnull</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">().</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">sum</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">df </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">== </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">unknown</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">).</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">sum</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### Several categorical variables contain the category “unknown,” which represents implicit missingness.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
