<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 4.2 Handling Missing Values</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">pdays_never_contacted</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">] = (</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">pdays</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">] == </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">999</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">).</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">astype</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_val</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">999</span><span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">astype</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_test</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">pdays_never_contacted</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">] = (</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_test</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">pdays</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">] == </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">999</span><span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">astype</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">int</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 4.3 Fitted Operations</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### Imputation parameters must be computed using the training set only to avoid incorporating information from validation or test data.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;hr </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;ls0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">#%% </span>
<span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1"># 5. Encoding Categorical Variables</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 5.1 Identify Categoricals</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">numerical_cols </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">select_dtypes</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">include</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">int64</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">float64</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">]).</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">columns</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">categorical_cols </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">select_dtypes</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">include</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">object</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">]).</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">columns</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Numerical variables:</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">numerical_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">\n</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">Categorical variables:</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">categorical_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 5.2 Nominal v Ordinal</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### The only ordinal variable is education, this is because there is a hierarchal order to it (least to ost educated). This leaves job, marital, default, housing, loan, contact, month, day_of_week, y, and poutcome.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 5.3 Encoding Strategy</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">education_order </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= {</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">illiterate</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">: </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">0</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">basic.4y</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">: </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">1</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">basic.6y</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">: </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">2</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">basic.9y</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">: </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">3</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">high.school</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">: </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">4</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">professional.course</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">: </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">5</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">,</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">columns</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">columns</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">fill_value</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">0</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_test </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_test</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">reindex</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">columns</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">columns</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">fill_value</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">0</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">\n</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">Encoding complete.</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Training shape:</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">shape</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Validation shape:</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_val</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">shape</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Test shape:</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_test</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">shape</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 5.4 Encoder Fitting</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### Encoding decisions must be made using training sets only. If they were decided using the entire dataset it could lead to data leakage.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 5.5 Analysis</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### One-hot encoding increases dimensionality, allowing Logistic Regression model to display category specific shifts. The model can now create linear decision boundaries that differ across categories.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;hr </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;ls0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">#%% </span>
<span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1"># 6. Feature Scaling</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 6.1 Identification</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">numerical_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 5.2 Application of Strategy</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">scaler </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">StandardScaler</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">numerical_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">] = </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">scaler</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">fit_transform</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">numerical_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">])</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_val</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">numerical_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">] = </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">scaler</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">transform</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_val</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">numerical_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">])</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_test</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">numerical_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">] = </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">scaler</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">transform</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_test</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">numerical_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">])</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 6.3 Justification</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### Logistic Regression uses regularization and need comparable feature scales. Since the numerical values in this data set exist on different scales it is important to basically translate them in a way that the model will better understand. Without scaling, features with larger numerical ranges would dominate the gradient updates and exert disproportionate influence on the model.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 6.4 Fitted on Training Set</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### The scaler must be fitted on the training set only because it estimates parameters.If fitted on the entire dataset, information from validation and test sets would influence the scaling parameters, resulting in data leakage.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 6.5 Affects of Feature Scaling</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### Gradient-Based Optimization: Scaling ensures stable and efficient convergence. Without scaling gradients with larger scales would dominate.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### Coefficient Comparability: Without scaling, coefficients are not comparable. This allows the coefficients to truly represent a stronger predictive influence.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### Regularization: Regularization penalizes large coefficients. If features are on different scales, regularization unfairly penalizes some features more than others.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;hr </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;ls0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">#%% </span>
<span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1"># 7. Feature Selection</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 7.1 Low Variance Features</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">variance </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">select_dtypes</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">include</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">int64</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">float64</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">]).</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">var</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">Lowest variances:</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">variance</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">sort_values</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">().</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">head</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">())</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">low_variance_cols </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">variance</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">variance </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;lt; </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s5&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">0.01</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">].</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">index</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s2&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">\n</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">Low variance columns:</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">print</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">low_variance_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">drop</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">columns</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">low_variance_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_val </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_val</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">drop</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">columns</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">low_variance_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_test </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_test</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">drop</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">columns</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">low_variance_cols</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">)</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>


<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">### Features with extremely low variance contain little information for classification and may introduce numerical instability.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s1&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">## 7.2 Correlated Numerical Features</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">corr_matrix </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">X_train</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">select_dtypes</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">include</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">=[</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">int64</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">, </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s4&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s1">float64</span><span class="s4">&amp;quot;</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">]).</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">corr</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">().</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">abs</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">()</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>

<span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">upper_triangle </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">= </span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">corr_matrix</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">where</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">(</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;</span>
    <span class="s0">&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">np</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s3&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">.</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span class="s3">=&quot;s0&quot;</span><span class="s0">&gt;</span><span class="s1">triu</span><span class="s0">&lt;/span&gt;&lt;span </span><span class="s2">class</span><span
